depression.description: I often feel like I'm worthless and that my life has no value. No matter what I do, I can't shake this belief that I'm just a waste of space.
I keep putting off my personal projects, like building my website, because I feel like what's the point? If no one will recognize my efforts, why even bother?
I constantly worry that I'm not using my time wisely. If I'm not being productive, I feel like I'm just wasting my life away, and that thought makes me anxious.

depression.topic: Using work as a coping mechanism
depression.description: I throw myself into work to feel productive and avoid dealing with my feelings of worthlessness. But sometimes, I wonder if I'm just using it to escape.
When I feel unproductive, I find myself scrolling through social media for hours. It's a way to distract myself, but deep down, I know it's not fulfilling.

Delusion.description: I have this nagging fear that if I create something for myself, like a website, no one will care or acknowledge it. That thought makes me feel invisible.
I often reflect on my father's expectations and how they affect me. I feel like I'm constantly trying to prove my worth, but it never feels like enough.
